conceptClusters.title: Retained box areas and sizing edges
exitEvidence: Learner computes content and border boxes including zero floors, intrinsic pressure, paint, hit, and outer layout areas.
Learner proves whether changed overflow begins in box arithmetic or later content and layout constraints.

conceptClusters.title: Normal flow and intrinsic contributions
exitEvidence: Learner predicts block and inline normal flow, intrinsic contributions, available space, and active minimum or maximum constraints.
Learner chooses auto, min-content, max-content, or fit-content from changed content and context without magic dimensions.

conceptClusters.title: Length, percentage, and calculation reference systems
exitEvidence: Learner traces absolute, font-relative, viewport, and percentage values through exact references and resolution stages.
Learner proves CSS math syntax, numeric types, property grammar, and active bounds across low, middle, high, and invalid cases.

conceptClusters.title: Flow-relative geometry and content access
exitEvidence: Learner maps logical axes through LTR, RTL, and vertical writing while retaining intentionally physical effects and source order.
Learner locates root size pressure and preserves content, focus, errors, direct input, programmatic access, and static output.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A worked sizing observatory grows from retained box equations into normal-flow, intrinsic, unit, percentage, math, logical-axis, and overflow-access traces.
activityDesigns.startingState: Learner can measure box areas but has not connected content contributions, reference frames, or overflow paths.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner explains one component from declared box edge through used normal-flow size and changed content access.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback stops at first incorrect reference frame, contribution, value type, axis mapping, or access claim.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals one equation term or evidence surface while reserving changed result.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss routes to a smaller parallel trace and requires an explained prediction before return.
